## Section 2: Navigation Flow

- Application starts at Dashboard Page (dashboard-page).
- From Dashboard:
  - browse-restaurants-button -> Restaurant Listing Page (restaurants-page).
  - view-cart-button -> Shopping Cart Page (cart-page).
  - active-orders-button -> Active Orders Page (active-orders-page).

- From Restaurant Listing Page:
  - view-restaurant-button-{restaurant_id} -> Restaurant Menu Page (menu-page) for selected restaurant.

- From Restaurant Menu Page:
  - add-to-cart-button-{item_id} -> Adds item to Shopping Cart.
  - view-item-details-{item_id} -> Item Details Page (item-details-page) for selected item.

- From Item Details Page:
  - add-to-cart-button -> Add selected quantity to Shopping Cart.

- From Shopping Cart Page:
  - update-quantity-{item_id} -> Updates item quantity in cart.
  - remove-item-button-{item_id} -> Removes item from cart.
  - proceed-checkout-button -> Checkout Page (checkout-page).

- From Checkout Page:
  - place-order-button -> Places order and navigates to Active Orders Page.

- From Active Orders Page:
  - track-order-button-{order_id} -> Order Tracking Page (tracking-page).
  - status-filter -> Filters orders by status.
  - back-to-dashboard -> Dashboard Page.

- From Order Tracking Page:
  - back-to-orders -> Active Orders Page.

- From Reviews Page:
  - write-review-button -> Write Review Page (not detailed in initial requirements, assumed as separate or modal).
  - filter-by-rating -> Filters reviews.
  - back-to-dashboard -> Dashboard Page.

## Section 3: Data Storage Formats

### 1. Restaurants Data
- File Name: restaurants.txt
- Schema: restaurant_id|name|cuisine|address|phone|rating|delivery_time|min_order
- Fields:
  - restaurant_id: integer
  - name: string
  - cuisine: string
  - address: string
  - phone: string
  - rating: float
  - delivery_time: integer (minutes)
  - min_order: float (currency)
- Example:
  1|Dragon House|Chinese|123 Main St|555-0001|4.5|30|15.00

### 2. Menus Data
- File Name: menus.txt
- Schema: item_id|restaurant_id|item_name|category|description|price|availability
- Fields:
  - item_id: integer
  - restaurant_id: integer
  - item_name: string
  - category: string
  - description: string
  - price: float
  - availability: boolean (1 for available, 0 for unavailable)
- Example:
  1|1|Fried Rice|Main Course|Steamed rice with vegetables and egg|12.99|1

### 3. Cart Data
- File Name: cart.txt
- Schema: cart_id|item_id|restaurant_id|quantity|added_date
- Fields:
  - cart_id: integer
  - item_id: integer
  - restaurant_id: integer
  - quantity: integer
  - added_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- Example:
  1|1|1|2|2025-01-15

### 4. Orders Data
- File Name: orders.txt
- Schema: order_id|customer_name|restaurant_id|order_date|total_amount|status|delivery_address|phone_number
- Fields:
  - order_id: integer
  - customer_name: string
  - restaurant_id: integer
  - order_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD)
  - total_amount: float
  - status: string (e.g., Delivered, On the Way, Preparing)
  - delivery_address: string
  - phone_number: string
- Example:
  1|John Doe|1|2025-01-10|21.98|Delivered|123 Main St, NYC|555-1234

### 5. Order Items Data
- File Name: order_items.txt
- Schema: order_item_id|order_id|item_id|quantity|price
- Fields:
  - order_item_id: integer
  - order_id: integer
  - item_id: integer
  - quantity: integer
  - price: float
- Example:
  1|1|1|2|12.99

### 6. Deliveries Data
- File Name: deliveries.txt
- Schema: delivery_id|order_id|driver_name|driver_phone|vehicle_info|status|estimated_time
- Fields:
  - delivery_id: integer
  - order_id: integer
  - driver_name: string
  - driver_phone: string
  - vehicle_info: string
  - status: string
  - estimated_time: datetime string (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
- Example:
  1|1|Mike Johnson|555-9001|Bike|Delivered|2025-01-10 18:45

### 7. Reviews Data
- File Name: reviews.txt
- Schema: review_id|restaurant_id|customer_name|rating|review_text|review_date
- Fields:
  - review_id: integer
  - restaurant_id: integer
  - customer_name: string
  - rating: integer (1-5)
  - review_text: string
  - review_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- Example:
  1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Excellent food and fast delivery!|2025-01-12

INPUT: === design_spec.md ===
# FoodDelivery Web Application Design Specification

---

## Section 1: Page Layouts and Element IDs

### 1. Dashboard Page
- Page Title: Food Delivery Dashboard
- Container ID: dashboard-page (Div)
- Elements:
  - featured-restaurants (Div): Displays featured restaurant recommendations.
  - browse-restaurants-button (Button): Navigates to Restaurant Listing Page.
  - view-cart-button (Button): Navigates to Shopping Cart Page.
  - active-orders-button (Button): Navigates to Active Orders Page.

### 2. Restaurant Listing Page
- Page Title: Browse Restaurants
- Container ID: restaurants-page (Div)
- Elements:
  - search-input (Input): Field to search restaurants by name or cuisine.
  - cuisine-filter (Dropdown): Filter restaurants by cuisine (Chinese, Italian, Indian, American, etc.).
  - restaurants-grid (Div): Grid for displaying restaurant cards.
  - view-restaurant-button-{restaurant_id} (Button): View restaurant menu; one per restaurant card.

### 3. Restaurant Menu Page
- Page Title: Restaurant Menu
- Container ID: menu-page (Div)
- Elements:
  - restaurant-name (H1): Displays restaurant name.
  - restaurant-info (Div): Displays restaurant address, phone, rating.
  - menu-items-grid (Div): Grid showing menu items with photos, names, descriptions, prices.
  - add-to-cart-button-{item_id} (Button): Add menu item to cart; one per menu item.
  - view-item-details-{item_id} (Button): View item details; one per menu item.

### 4. Item Details Page
- Page Title: Item Details
- Container ID: item-details-page (Div)
- Elements:
  - item-name (H1): Displays item name.
  - item-description (Div): Shows description and ingredients.
  - item-price (Div): Displays item price.
  - quantity-input (Input number): Quantity selection before adding to cart.
  - add-to-cart-button (Button): Adds item with quantity to cart.

### 5. Shopping Cart Page
- Page Title: Shopping Cart
- Container ID: cart-page (Div)
- Elements:
  - cart-items-table (Table): Displays cart items - name, quantity, price, subtotal.
  - update-quantity-{item_id} (Input number): Update quantity per cart item.
  - remove-item-button-{item_id} (Button): Remove item from cart.
  - proceed-checkout-button (Button): Proceed to checkout page.
  - total-amount (Div): Displays total cart amount.

### 6. Checkout Page
- Page Title: Checkout
- Container ID: checkout-page (Div)
- Elements:
  - customer-name (Input): Enter customer name.
  - delivery-address (Textarea): Enter delivery address.
  - phone-number (Input): Enter phone number.
  - payment-method (Dropdown): Select payment method (Credit Card, Cash, PayPal).
  - place-order-button (Button): Confirm and place the order.

### 7. Active Orders Page
- Page Title: Active Orders
- Container ID: active-orders-page (Div)
- Elements:
  - orders-list (Div): Displays active orders with order ID, restaurant, status, ETA.
  - track-order-button-{order_id} (Button): View tracking details.
  - status-filter (Dropdown): Filter orders by status (All, Preparing, On the Way, Delivered).
  - back-to-dashboard (Button): Return to dashboard.

### 8. Order Tracking Page
- Page Title: Track Order
- Container ID: tracking-page (Div)
- Elements:
  - order-details (Div): Shows complete order details and timeline.
  - delivery-driver-info (Div): Driver name, phone, vehicle info.
  - estimated-time (Div): Displays estimated delivery time.
  - order-items-list (Div): List of ordered items.
  - back-to-orders (Button): Return to Active Orders Page.

### 9. Reviews Page
- Page Title: Order Reviews
- Container ID: reviews-page (Div)
- Elements:
  - reviews-list (Div): List of reviews with restaurant name, rating, and text.
  - write-review-button (Button): Navigate to write review page.
  - filter-by-rating (Dropdown): Filter reviews by rating (All, 5 stars, 4 stars, etc.).
  - back-to-dashboard (Button): Return to dashboard.

---

## Section 2: Navigation Flow

- Application starts at Dashboard Page (dashboard-page).
- From Dashboard:
  - browse-restaurants-button -> Restaurant Listing Page (restaurants-page).
  - view-cart-button -> Shopping Cart Page (cart-page).
  - active-orders-button -> Active Orders Page (active-orders-page).

- From Restaurant Listing Page:
  - view-restaurant-button-{restaurant_id} -> Restaurant Menu Page (menu-page) for selected restaurant.

- From Restaurant Menu Page:
  - add-to-cart-button-{item_id} -> Adds item to Shopping Cart.
  - view-item-details-{item_id} -> Item Details Page (item-details-page) for selected item.

- From Item Details Page:
  - add-to-cart-button -> Add selected quantity to Shopping Cart.

- From Shopping Cart Page:
  - update-quantity-{item_id} -> Updates item quantity in cart.
  - remove-item-button-{item_id} -> Removes item from cart.
  - proceed-checkout-button -> Checkout Page (checkout-page).

- From Checkout Page:
  - place-order-button -> Places order and navigates to Active Orders Page.

- From Active Orders Page:
  - track-order-button-{order_id} -> Order Tracking Page (tracking-page).
  - status-filter -> Filters orders by status.
  - back-to-dashboard -> Dashboard Page.

- From Order Tracking Page:
  - back-to-orders -> Active Orders Page.

- From Reviews Page:
  - write-review-button -> Write Review Page (not detailed in initial requirements, assumed as separate or modal).
  - filter-by-rating -> Filters reviews.
  - back-to-dashboard -> Dashboard Page.

---

## Section 3: Data Storage Formats

### 1. Restaurants Data
- File Name: restaurants.txt
- Schema: restaurant_id|name|cuisine|address|phone|rating|delivery_time|min_order
- Fields:
  - restaurant_id: integer
  - name: string
  - cuisine: string
  - address: string
  - phone: string
  - rating: float
  - delivery_time: integer (minutes)
  - min_order: float (currency)
- Example:
  1|Dragon House|Chinese|123 Main St|555-0001|4.5|30|15.00

### 2. Menus Data
- File Name: menus.txt
- Schema: item_id|restaurant_id|item_name|category|description|price|availability
- Fields:
  - item_id: integer
  - restaurant_id: integer
  - item_name: string
  - category: string
  - description: string
  - price: float
  - availability: boolean (1 for available, 0 for unavailable)
- Example:
  1|1|Fried Rice|Main Course|Steamed rice with vegetables and egg|12.99|1

### 3. Cart Data
- File Name: cart.txt
- Schema: cart_id|item_id|restaurant_id|quantity|added_date
- Fields:
  - cart_id: integer
  - item_id: integer
  - restaurant_id: integer
  - quantity: integer
  - added_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- Example:
  1|1|1|2|2025-01-15

### 4. Orders Data
- File Name: orders.txt
- Schema: order_id|customer_name|restaurant_id|order_date|total_amount|status|delivery_address|phone_number
- Fields:
  - order_id: integer
  - customer_name: string
  - restaurant_id: integer
  - order_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD)
  - total_amount: float
  - status: string (e.g., Delivered, On the Way, Preparing)
  - delivery_address: string
  - phone_number: string
- Example:
  1|John Doe|1|2025-01-10|21.98|Delivered|123 Main St, NYC|555-1234

### 5. Order Items Data
- File Name: order_items.txt
- Schema: order_item_id|order_id|item_id|quantity|price
- Fields:
  - order_item_id: integer
  - order_id: integer
  - item_id: integer
  - quantity: integer
  - price: float
- Example:
  1|1|1|2|12.99

### 6. Deliveries Data
- File Name: deliveries.txt
- Schema: delivery_id|order_id|driver_name|driver_phone|vehicle_info|status|estimated_time
- Fields:
  - delivery_id: integer
  - order_id: integer
  - driver_name: string
  - driver_phone: string
  - vehicle_info: string
  - status: string
  - estimated_time: datetime string (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
- Example:
  1|1|Mike Johnson|555-9001|Bike|Delivered|2025-01-10 18:45

### 7. Reviews Data
- File Name: reviews.txt
- Schema: review_id|restaurant_id|customer_name|rating|review_text|review_date
- Fields:
  - review_id: integer
  - restaurant_id: integer
  - customer_name: string
  - rating: integer (1-5)
  - review_text: string
  - review_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- Example:
  1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Excellent food and fast delivery!|2025-01-12

---

This specification document fully defines the page structures, navigation logic, and local data formats for the FoodDelivery Python web application as required.

Item Details Page\\n- **Page Title**: Item Details\\n- **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific menu item including ingredients and nutritional info.\\n- **Elements**:\\n  - **ID: item-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the item details page.\\n  - **ID: item-name** - Type: H1 - Display item name.\\n  - **ID: item-description** - Type: Div - Display item description and ingredients.\\n  - **ID: item-price** - Type: Div - Display item price.\\n  - **ID: quantity-input** - Type: Input (number) - Field to select quantity before adding to cart.\\n  - **ID: add-to-cart-button** - Type: Button - Button to add item with selected quantity to cart.\\n\\n### 5. Shopping Cart Page\\n- **Page Title**: Shopping Cart\\n- **Overview**: A page displaying items in the cart with quantity management and checkout option.\\n- **Elements**:\\n  - **ID: cart-page** - Type: Div - Container for the cart page.\\n  - **ID: cart-items-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying cart items with name, quantity, price, and subtotal.\\n  - **ID: update-quantity-{item_id}** - Type: Input (number) - Field to update item quantity (each cart item has this).\\n  - **ID: remove-item-button-{item_id}** - Type: Button - Button to remove item from cart (each cart item has this).\\n  - **ID: proceed-checkout-button** - Type: Button - Button to proceed to checkout.\\n  - **ID: total-amount** - Type: Div - Display total cart amount.\\n\\n### 6. Checkout Page\\n- **Page Title**: Checkout\\n- **Overview**: A page for users to enter delivery information and complete order placement.\\n- **Elements**:\\n  - **ID: checkout-page** - Type: Div - Container for the checkout page.\\n  - **ID: customer-name** - Type: Input - Field to input customer name.\\n  - **ID: delivery-address** - Type: Textarea - Field to input delivery address.\\n  - **ID: phone-number** - Type: Input - Field to input phone number.\\n  - **ID: payment-method** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select payment method (Credit Card, Cash, PayPal).\\n  - **ID: place-order-button** - Type: Button - Button to confirm and place order.\\n\\n### 7. Active Orders Page\\n- **Page Title**: Active Orders\\n- **Overview**: A page displaying current orders being prepared or delivered with tracking information.\\n- **Elements**:\\n  - **ID: active-orders-page** - Type: Div - Container for the active orders page.\\n  - **ID: orders-list** - Type: Div - List displaying active orders with order ID, restaurant, status, and ETA.\\n  - **ID: track-order-button-{order_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view detailed tracking (each order has this).\\n  - **ID: status-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by status (All, Preparing, On the Way, Delivered).\\n  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.\\n\\n### 8. Order Tracking Page\\n- **Page Title**: Track Order\\n- **Overview**: A page displaying detailed order tracking information with delivery person details and real-time status updates.\\n- **Elements**:\\n  - **ID: tracking-page** - Type: Div - Container for the tracking page.\\n  - **ID: order-details** - Type: Div - Display complete order details and timeline.\\n  - **ID: delivery-driver-info** - Type: Div - Display delivery driver name, phone, and vehicle info.\\n  - **ID: estimated-time** - Type: Div - Display estimated delivery time.\\n  - **ID: order-items-list** - Type: Div - List of items in the order.\\n  - **ID: back-to-orders** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to active orders.\\n\\n### 9. Reviews Page\\n- **Page Title**: Order Reviews\\n- **Overview**: A page displaying all customer reviews for restaurants and allowing users to write new reviews.\\n- **Elements**:\\n  - **ID: reviews-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.\\n  - **ID: reviews-list** - Type: Div - List of all reviews with restaurant name, rating, and review text.\\n  - **ID: write-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write review page.\\n  - **ID: filter-by-rating** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter reviews by rating (All, 5 stars, 4 stars, etc.).\\n  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.\\n\\n## 4. Data Storage\\n\\nThe \'FoodDelivery\' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory \'data\'. The following data formats and examples are defined:\\n\\n### 1. Restaurants Data\\n- **File Name**: `restaurants.txt`\\n- **Data Format**:\\n  ```\\n  restaurant_id|name|cuisine|address|phone|rating|delivery_time|min_order\\n  ```\\n- **Example Data**:\\n  ```\\n  1|Dragon House|Chinese|123 Main St|555-0001|4.5|30|15.00\\n  2|La Bella Italia|Italian|456 Oak Ave|555-0002|4.8|25|20.00\\n  3|Taj Mahal|Indian|789 Elm St|555-0003|4.6|35|18.00\\n  ```\\n\\n### 2. Menus Data\\n- **File Name**: `menus.txt`\\n- **Data Format**:\\n  ```\\n  item_id|restaurant_id|item_name|category|description|price|availability\\n  ```\\n- **Example Data**:\\n  ```\\n  1|1|Fried Rice|Main Course|Steamed rice with vegetables and egg|12.99|1\\n  2|1|Spring Rolls|Appetizer|Crispy rolls with pork filling|8.99|1\\n  3|2|Spaghetti Carbonara|Pasta|Classic Italian pasta with cream sauce|14.99|1\\n  ```\\n\\n### 3. Cart Data\\n- **File Name**: `cart.txt`\\n- **Data Format**:\\n  ```\\n  cart_id|item_id|restaurant_id|quantity|added_date\\n  ```\\n- **Example Data**:\\n  ```\\n  1|1|1|2|2025-01-15\\n  2|3|2|1|2025-01-16\\n  ```\\n\\n### 4. Orders Data\\n- **File Name**: `orders.txt`\\n- **Data Format**:\\n  ```\\n  order_id|customer_name|restaurant_id|order_date|total_amount|status|delivery_address|phone_number\\n  ```\\n- **Example Data**:\\n  ```\\n  1|John Doe|1|2025-01-10|21.98|Delivered|123 Main St, NYC|555-1234\\n  2|Jane Smith|2|2025-01-14|14.99|On the Way|456 Oak Ave, LA|555-5678\\n  ```\\n\\n### 5. Order Items Data\\n- **File Name**: `order_items.txt`\\n- **Data Format**:\\n  ```\\n  order_item_id|order_id|item_id|quantity|price\\n  ```\\n- **Example Data**:\\n  ```\\n  1|1|1|2|12.99\\n  2|1|2|1|8.99\\n  3|2|3|1|14.99\\n  ```\\n\\n### 6. Deliveries Data\\n- **File Name**: `deliveries.txt`\\n- **Data Format**:\\n  ```\\n  delivery_id|order_id|driver_name|driver_phone|vehicle_info|status|estimated_time\\n  ```\\n- **Example Data**:\\n  ```\\n  1|1|Mike Johnson|555-9001|Bike|Delivered|2025-01-10 18:45\\n  2|2|Sarah Williams|555-9002|Car|On the Way|2025-01-14 19:30\\n  ```\\n\\n### 7. Reviews Data\\n- **File Name**: `reviews.txt`\\n- **Data Format**:\\n  ```\\n  review_id|restaurant_id|customer_name|rating|review_text|review_date\\n  ```\\n- **Example Data**:\\n  ```\\n  1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Excellent food and fast delivery!|2025-01-12\\n  2|2|Bob Williams|4|Great pasta, slightly delayed delivery.|2025-01-13\\n  3|3|Charlie Brown|5|Best Indian food in town!|2025-01-15\\n  ```\\n"}]\n\n=== Current design_spec.md ===\n# FoodDelivery Web Application Design Specification\n\n---\n\n## Section 1: Page Layouts and Element IDs\n\n### 1. Dashboard Page\n- Page Title: Food Delivery Dashboard\n- Container ID: dashboard-page (Div)\n- Elements:\n  - featured-restaurants (Div): Displays featured restaurant recommendations.\n  - browse-restaurants-button (Button): Navigates to Restaurant Listing Page.\n  - view-cart-button (Button): Navigates to Shopping Cart Page.\n  - active-orders-button (Button): Navigates to Active Orders Page.\n\n### 2. Restaurant Listing Page\n- Page Title: Browse Restaurants\n- Container ID: restaurants-page (Div)\n- Elements:\n  - search-input (Input): Field to search restaurants by name or cuisine.\n  - cuisine-filter (Dropdown): Filter restaurants by cuisine (Chinese, Italian, Indian, American, etc.).\n  - restaurants-grid (Div): Grid for displaying restaurant cards.\n  - view-restaurant-button-{restaurant_id} (Button): View restaurant menu; one per restaurant card.\n\n### 3. Restaurant Menu Page\n- Page Title: Restaurant Menu\n- Container ID: menu-page (Div)\n- Elements:\n  - restaurant-name (H1): Displays restaurant name.\n  - restaurant-info (Div): Displays restaurant address, phone, rating.\n  - menu-items-grid (Div): Grid showing menu items with photos, names, descriptions, prices.\n  - add-to-cart-button-{item_id} (Button): Add menu item to cart; one per menu item.\n  - view-item-details-{item_id} (Button): View item details; one per menu item.\n\n### 4. Item Details Page\n- Page Title: Item Details\n- Container ID: item-details-page (Div)\n- Elements:\n  - item-name (H1): Displays item name.\n  - item-description (Div): Shows description and ingredients.\n  - item-price (Div): Displays item price.\n  - quantity-input (Input number): Quantity selection before adding to cart.\n  - add-to-cart-button (Button): Adds item with quantity to cart.\n\n### 5. Shopping Cart Page\n- Page Title: Shopping Cart\n- Container ID: cart-page (Div)\n- Elements:\n  - cart-items-table (Table): Displays cart items - name, quantity, price, subtotal.\n  - update-quantity-{item_id} (Input number): Update quantity per cart item.\n  - remove-item-button-{item_id} (Button): Remove item from cart.\n  - proceed-checkout-button (Button): Proceed to checkout page.\n  - total-amount (Div): Displays total cart amount.\n\n### 6. Checkout Page\n- Page Title: Checkout\n- Container ID: checkout-page (Div)\n- Elements:\n  - customer-name (Input): Enter customer name.\n  - delivery-address (Textarea): Enter delivery address.\n  - phone-number (Input): Enter phone number.\n  - payment-method (Dropdown): Select payment method (Credit Card, Cash, PayPal).\n  - place-order-button (Button): Confirm and place the order.\n\n### 7. Active Orders Page\n- Page Title: Active Orders\n- Container ID: active-orders-page (Div)\n- Elements:\n  - orders-list (Div): Displays active orders with order ID, restaurant, status, ETA.\n  - track-order-button-{order_id} (Button): View tracking details.\n  - status-filter (Dropdown): Filter orders by status (All, Preparing, On the Way, Delivered).\n  - back-to-dashboard (Button): Return to dashboard.\n\n### 8. Order Tracking Page\n- Page Title: Track Order\n- Container ID: tracking-page (Div)\n- Elements:\n  - order-details (Div): Shows complete order details and timeline.\n  - delivery-driver-info (Div): Driver name, phone, vehicle info.\n  - estimated-time (Div): Displays estimated delivery time.\n  - order-items-list (Div): List of ordered items.\n  - back-to-orders (Button): Return to Active Orders Page.\n\n### 9. Reviews Page\n- Page Title: Order Reviews\n- Container ID: reviews-page (Div)\n- Elements:\n  - reviews-list (Div): List of reviews with restaurant name, rating, and text.\n  - write-review-button (Button): Navigate to write review page.\n  - filter-by-rating (Dropdown): Filter reviews by rating (All, 5 stars, 4 stars, etc.).\n  - back-to-dashboard (Button): Return to dashboard.\n\n---\n\n## Section 2: Navigation Flow\n\n- Application starts at Dashboard Page (dashboard-page).\n- From Dashboard:\n  - browse-restaurants-button -> Restaurant Listing Page (restaurants-page).\n  - view-cart-button -> Shopping Cart Page (cart-page).\n  - active-orders-button -> Active Orders Page (active-orders-page).\n\n- From Restaurant Listing Page:\n  - view-restaurant-button-{restaurant_id} -> Restaurant Menu Page (menu-page) for selected restaurant.\n\n- From Restaurant Menu Page:\n  - add-to-cart-button-{item_id} -> Adds item to Shopping Cart.\n  - view-item-details-{item_id} -> Item Details Page (item-details-page) for selected item.\n\n- From Item Details Page:\n  - add-to-cart-button -> Add selected quantity to Shopping Cart.\n\n- From Shopping Cart Page:\n  - update-quantity-{item_id} -> Updates item quantity in cart.\n  - remove-item-button-{item_id} -> Removes item from cart.\n  - proceed-checkout-button -> Checkout Page (checkout-page).\n\n- From Checkout Page:\n  - place-order-button -> Places order and navigates to Active Orders Page.\n\n- From Active Orders Page:\n  - track-order-button-{order_id} -> Order Tracking Page (tracking-page).\n  - status-filter -> Filters orders by status.\n  - back-to-dashboard -> Dashboard Page.\n\n- From Order Tracking Page:\n  - back-to-orders -> Active Orders Page.\n\n- From Reviews Page:\n  - write-review-button -> Write Review Page (not detailed in initial requirements, assumed as separate or modal).\n  - filter-by-rating -> Filters reviews.\n  - back-to-dashboard -> Dashboard Page.\n\n---\n\n## Section 3: Data Storage Formats\n\n### 1. Restaurants Data\n- File Name: restaurants.txt\n- Schema: restaurant_id|name|cuisine|address|phone|rating|delivery_time|min_order\n- Fields:\n  - restaurant_id: integer\n  - name: string\n  - cuisine: string\n  - address: string\n  - phone: string\n  - rating: float\n  - delivery_time: integer (minutes)\n  - min_order: float (currency)\n- Example:\n  1|Dragon House|Chinese|123 Main St|555-0001|4.5|30|15.00\n\n### 2. Menus Data\n- File Name: menus.txt\n- Schema: item_id|restaurant_id|item_name|category|description|price|availability\n- Fields:\n  - item_id: integer\n  - restaurant_id: integer\n  - item_name: string\n  - category: string\n  - description: string\n  - price: float\n  - availability: boolean (1 for available, 0 for unavailable)\n- Example:\n  1|1|Fried Rice|Main Course|Steamed rice with vegetables and egg|12.99|1\n\n### 3. Cart Data\n- File Name: cart.txt\n- Schema: cart_id|item_id|restaurant_id|quantity|added_date\n- Fields:\n  - cart_id: integer\n  - item_id: integer\n  - restaurant_id: integer\n  - quantity: integer\n  - added_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD)\n- Example:\n  1|1|1|2|2025-01-15\n\n### 4. Orders Data\n- File Name: orders.txt\n- Schema: order_id|customer_name|restaurant_id|order_date|total_amount|status|delivery_address|phone_number\n- Fields:\n  - order_id: integer\n  - customer_name: string\n  - restaurant_id: integer\n  - order_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD)\n  - total_amount: float\n  - status: string (e.g., Delivered, On the Way, Preparing)\n  - delivery_address: string\n  - phone_number: string\n- Example:\n  1|John Doe|1|2025-01-10|21.98|Delivered|123 Main St, NYC|555-1234\n\n### 5. Order Items Data\n- File Name: order_items.txt\n- Schema: order_item_id|order_id|item_id|quantity|price\n- Fields:\n  - order_item_id: integer\n  - order_id: integer\n  - item_id: integer\n  - quantity: integer\n  - price: float\n- Example:\n  1|1|1|2|12.99\n\n### 6. Deliveries Data\n- File Name: deliveries.txt\n- Schema: delivery_id|order_id|driver_name|driver_phone|vehicle_info|status|estimated_time\n- Fields:\n  - delivery_id: integer\n  - order_id: integer\n  - driver_name: string\n  - driver_phone: string\n  - vehicle_info: string\n  - status: string\n  - estimated_time: datetime string (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)\n- Example:\n  1|1|Mike Johnson|555-9001|Bike|Delivered|2025-01-10 18:45\n\n### 7. Reviews Data\n- File Name: reviews.txt\n- Schema: review_id|restaurant_id|customer_name|rating|review_text|review_date\n- Fields:\n  - review_id: integer\n  - restaurant_id: integer\n  - customer_name: string\n  - rating: integer (1-5)\n  - review_text: string\n  - review_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD)\n- Example:\n  1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Excellent food and fast delivery!|2025-01-12\n\n---\n\nThis specification document fully defines the page structures, navigation logic, and local data formats for the FoodDelivery Python web application as required.\n\n=== Dashboard Page - Page Title: Food Delivery Dashboard - Container ID: dashboard-page (Div) - Elements:   - featured-restaurants (Div): Displays featured restaurant recommendations.   - browse-restaurants-button (Button): Navigates to Restaurant Listing Page.   - view-cart-button (Button): Navigates to Shopping Cart Page.   - active-orders-button (Button): Navigates to Active Orders Page.  ### 2. Restaurant Listing Page - Page Title: Browse Restaurants - Container ID: restaurants-page (Div) - Elements:   - search-input (Input): Field to search restaurants by name or cuisine.   - cuisine-filter (Dropdown): Filter restaurants by cuisine (Chinese, Italian, Indian, American, etc.).   - restaurants-grid (Div): Grid for displaying restaurant cards.   - view-restaurant-button-{restaurant_id} (Button): View restaurant menu; one per restaurant card.  ### 3. Restaurant Menu Page - Page Title: Restaurant Menu - Container ID: menu-page (Div) - Elements:   - restaurant-name (H1): Displays restaurant name.   - restaurant-info (Div): Displays restaurant address, phone, rating.   - menu-items-grid (Div): Grid showing menu items with photos, names, descriptions, prices.   - add-to-cart-button-{item_id} (Button): Add menu item to cart; one per menu item.   - view-item-details-{item_id} (Button): View item details; one per menu item.  ### 4. Item Details Page - Page Title: Item Details - Container ID: item-details-page (Div) - Elements:   - item-name (H1): Displays item name.   - item-description (Div): Shows description and ingredients.   - item-price (Div): Displays item price.   - quantity-input (Input number): Quantity selection before adding to cart.   - add-to-cart-button (Button): Adds item with quantity to cart.  ### 5. Shopping Cart Page - Page Title: Shopping Cart - Container ID: cart-page (Div) - Elements:   - cart-items-table (Table): Displays cart items - name, quantity, price, subtotal.   - update-quantity-{item_id} (Input number): Update quantity per cart item.   - remove-item-button-{item_id} (Button): Remove item from cart.   - proceed-checkout-button (Button): Proceed to checkout page.   - total-amount (Div): Displays total cart amount.  ### 6. Checkout Page - Page Title: Checkout - Container ID: checkout-page (Div) - Elements:   - customer-name (Input): Enter customer name.   - delivery-address (Textarea): Enter delivery address.   - phone-number (Input): Enter phone number.   - payment-method (Dropdown): Select payment method (Credit Card, Cash, PayPal).   - place-order-button (Button): Confirm and place the order.  ### 7. Active Orders Page - Page Title: Active Orders - Container ID: active-orders-page (Div) - Elements:   - orders-list (Div): Displays active orders with order ID, restaurant, status, ETA.   - track-order-button-{order_id} (Button): View tracking details.   - status-filter (Dropdown): Filter orders by status (All, Preparing, On the Way, Delivered).   - back-to-dashboard (Button): Return to dashboard.  ### 8. Order Tracking Page - Page Title: Track Order - Container ID: tracking-page (Div) - Elements:   - order-details (Div): Shows complete order details and timeline.   - delivery-driver-info (Div): Driver name, phone, vehicle info.   - estimated-time (Div): Displays estimated delivery time.   - order-items-list (Div): List of ordered items.   - back-to-orders (Button): Return to Active Orders Page.  ### 9. Reviews Page - Page Title: Order Reviews - Container ID: reviews-page (Div) - Elements:   - reviews-list (Div): List of reviews with restaurant name, rating, and text.   - write-review-button (Button): Navigate to write review page.   - filter-by-rating (Dropdown): Filter reviews by rating (All, 5 stars, 4 stars, etc.).   - back-to-dashboard (Button): Return to dashboard.  ---  ## Section 2: Navigation Flow  - Application starts at Dashboard Page (dashboard-page). - From Dashboard:   - browse-restaurants-button -> Restaurant Listing Page (restaurants-page).   - view-cart-button -> Shopping Cart Page (cart-page).   - active-orders-button -> Active Orders Page (active-orders-page).  - From Restaurant Listing Page:   - view-restaurant-button-{restaurant_id} -> Restaurant Menu Page (menu-page) for selected restaurant.  - From Restaurant Menu Page:   - add-to-cart-button-{item_id} -> Adds item to Shopping Cart.   - view-item-details-{item_id} -> Item Details Page (item-details-page) for selected item.  - From Item Details Page:   - add-to-cart-button -> Add selected quantity to Shopping Cart.  - From Shopping Cart Page:   - update-quantity-{item_id} -> Updates item quantity in cart.   - remove-item-button-{item_id} -> Removes item from cart.   - proceed-checkout-button -> Checkout Page (checkout-page).  - From Checkout Page:   - place-order-button -> Places order and navigates to Active Orders Page.  - From Active Orders Page:   - track-order-button-{order_id} -> Order Tracking Page (tracking-page).   - status-filter -> Filters orders by status.   - back-to-dashboard -> Dashboard Page.  - From Order Tracking Page:   - back-to-orders -> Active Orders Page.  - From Reviews Page:   - write-review-button -> Write Review Page (not detailed in initial requirements, assumed as separate or modal).   - filter-by-rating -> Filters reviews.   - back-to-dashboard -> Dashboard Page.  ---  ## Section 3: Data Storage Formats  ### 1. Restaurants Data - File Name: restaurants.txt - Schema: restaurant_id|name|cuisine|address|phone|rating|delivery_time|min_order - Fields:   - restaurant_id: integer   - name: string   - cuisine: string   - address: string   - phone: string   - rating: float   - delivery_time: integer (minutes)   - min_order: float (currency) - Example:   1|Dragon House|Chinese|123 Main St|555-0001|4.5|30|15.00  ### 2. Menus Data - File Name: menus.txt - Schema: item_id|restaurant_id|item_name|category|description|price|availability - Fields:   - item_id: integer   - restaurant_id: integer   - item_name: string   - category: string   - description: string   - price: float   - availability: boolean (1 for available, 0 for unavailable) - Example:   1|1|Fried Rice|Main Course|Steamed rice with vegetables and egg|12.99|1  ### 3. Cart Data - File Name: cart.txt - Schema: cart_id|item_id|restaurant_id|quantity|added_date - Fields:   - cart_id: integer   - item_id: integer   - restaurant_id: integer   - quantity: integer   - added_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD) - Example:   1|1|1|2|2025-01-15  ### 4. Orders Data - File Name: orders.txt - Schema: order_id|customer_name|restaurant_id|order_date|total_amount|status|delivery_address|phone_number - Fields:   - order_id: integer   - customer_name: string   - restaurant_id: integer   - order_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD)   - total_amount: float   - status: string (e.g., Delivered, On the Way, Preparing)   - delivery_address: string   - phone_number: string - Example:   1|John Doe|1|2025-01-10|21.98|Delivered|123 Main St, NYC|555-1234  ### 5. Order Items Data - File Name: order_items.txt - Schema: order_item_id|order_id|item_id|quantity|price - Fields:   - order_item_id: integer   - order_id: integer   - item_id: integer   - quantity: integer   - price: float - Example:   1|1|1|2|12.99  ### 6. Deliveries Data - File Name: deliveries.txt - Schema: delivery_id|order_id|driver_name|driver_phone|vehicle_info|status|estimated_time - Fields:   - delivery_id: integer   - order_id: integer   - driver_name: string   - driver_phone: string   - vehicle_info: string   - status: string   - estimated_time: datetime string (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM) - Example:   1|1|Mike Johnson|555-9001|Bike|Delivered|2025-01-10 18:45  ### 7. Reviews Data - File Name: reviews.txt - Schema: review_id|restaurant_id|customer_name|rating|review_text|review_date - Fields:   - review_id: integer   - restaurant_id: integer   - customer_name: string   - rating: integer (1-5)   - review_text: string   - review_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD) - Example:   1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Excellent food and fast delivery!|2025-01-12  ---  This specification document fully defines the page structures, navigation logic, and local data formats for the FoodDelivery Python web application as required.

er2qsgxw filterRestaurants() {
            var searchInput = document.getElementById('search-name').value.toLowerCase();
            var cuisineFilter = document.getElementById('cuisine-filter').value;
            var cards = document.getElementsByClassName('restaurant-card');
            for (var i = 0; i < cards.length; i++) {
                var name = cards[i].getAttribute('data-name').toLowerCase();
                var cuisine = cards[i].getAttribute('data-cuisine');
                if ((cuisineFilter === 'all' || cuisine === cuisineFilter) && name.includes(searchInput)) {
                    cards[i].style.display = '';
                } heqp {
                    cards[i].style.display = 'none';
                }

# FoodDelivery Web Application Design Specification

---

## Section 1: Page Layouts and Element IDs

### 1. Dashboard Page
- Page Title: Food Delivery Dashboard
- Container ID: dashboard-page (Div)
- Elements:
  - featured-restaurants (Div): Displays featured restaurant recommendations.
  - browse-restaurants-button (Button): Navigates to Restaurant Listing Page.
  - view-cart-button (Button): Navigates to Shopping Cart Page.
  - active-orders-button (Button): Navigates to Active Orders Page.

### 2. Restaurant Listing Page
- Page Title: Browse Restaurants
- Container ID: restaurants-page (Div)
- Elements:
  - search-input (Input): Field to search restaurants by name or cuisine.
  - cuisine-filter (Dropdown): Filter restaurants by cuisine (Chinese, Italian, Indian, American, etc.).
  - restaurants-grid (Div): Grid for displaying restaurant cards.
  - view-restaurant-button-{restaurant_id} (Button): View restaurant menu; one per restaurant card.

### 3. Restaurant Menu Page
- Page Title: Restaurant Menu
- Container ID: menu-page (Div)
- Elements:
  - restaurant-name (H1): Displays restaurant name.
  - restaurant-info (Div): Displays restaurant address, phone, rating.
  - menu-items-grid (Div): Grid showing menu items with photos, names, descriptions, prices.
  - add-to-cart-button-{item_id} (Button): Add menu item to cart; one per menu item.
  - view-item-details-{item_id} (Button): View item details; one per menu item.

### 4. Item Details Page
- Page Title: Item Details
- Container ID: item-details-page (Div)
- Elements:
  - item-name (H1): Displays item name.
  - item-description (Div): Shows description and ingredients.
  - item-price (Div): Displays item price.
  - quantity-input (Input number): Quantity selection before adding to cart.
  - add-to-cart-button (Button): Adds item with quantity to cart.

### 5. Shopping Cart Page
- Page Title: Shopping Cart
- Container ID: cart-page (Div)
- Elements:
  - cart-items-table (Table): Displays cart items - name, quantity, price, subtotal.
  - update-quantity-{item_id} (Input number): Update quantity per cart item.
  - remove-item-button-{item_id} (Button): Remove item from cart.
  - proceed-checkout-button (Button): Proceed to checkout page.
  - total-amount (Div): Displays total cart amount.

### 6. Checkout Page
- Page Title: Checkout
- Container ID: checkout-page (Div)
- Elements:
  - customer-name (Input): Enter customer name.
  - delivery-address (Textarea): Enter delivery address.
  - phone-number (Input): Enter phone number.
  - payment-method (Dropdown): Select payment method (Credit Card, Cash, PayPal).
  - place-order-button (Button): Confirm and place the order.

### 7. Active Orders Page
- Page Title: Active Orders
- Container ID: active-orders-page (Div)
- Elements:
  - orders-list (Div): Displays active orders with order ID, restaurant, status, ETA.
  - track-order-button-{order_id} (Button): View tracking details.
  - status-filter (Dropdown): Filter orders by status (All, Preparing, On the Way, Delivered).
  - back-to-dashboard (Button): Return to dashboard.

### 8. Order Tracking Page
- Page Title: Track Order
- Container ID: tracking-page (Div)
- Elements:
  - order-details (Div): Shows complete order details and timeline.
  - delivery-driver-info (Div): Driver name, phone, vehicle info.
  - estimated-time (Div): Displays estimated delivery time.
  - order-items-list (Div): List of ordered items.
  - back-to-orders (Button): Return to Active Orders Page.

### 9. Reviews Page
- Page Title: Order Reviews
- Container ID: reviews-page (Div)
- Elements:
  - reviews-list (Div): List of reviews with restaurant name, rating, and text.
  - write-review-button (Button): Navigate to write review page.
  - filter-by-rating (Dropdown): Filter reviews by rating (All, 5 stars, 4 stars, etc.).
  - back-to-dashboard (Button): Return to dashboard.

---

## Section 2: Navigation Flow

- Application starts at Dashboard Page (dashboard-page).
- From Dashboard:
  - browse-restaurants-button -> Restaurant Listing Page (restaurants-page).
  - view-cart-button -> Shopping Cart Page (cart-page).
  - active-orders-button -> Active Orders Page (active-orders-page).

- From Restaurant Listing Page:
  - view-restaurant-button-{restaurant_id} -> Restaurant Menu Page (menu-page) for selected restaurant.

- From Restaurant Menu Page:
  - add-to-cart-button-{item_id} -> Adds item to Shopping Cart.
  - view-item-details-{item_id} -> Item Details Page (item-details-page) for selected item.

- From Item Details Page:
  - add-to-cart-button -> Add selected quantity to Shopping Cart.

- From Shopping Cart Page:
  - update-quantity-{item_id} -> Updates item quantity in cart.
  - remove-item-button-{item_id} -> Removes item from cart.
  - proceed-checkout-button -> Checkout Page (checkout-page).

- From Checkout Page:
  - place-order-button -> Places order and navigates to Active Orders Page.

- From Active Orders Page:
  - track-order-button-{order_id} -> Order Tracking Page (tracking-page).
  - status-filter -> Filters orders by status.
  - back-to-dashboard -> Dashboard Page.

- From Order Tracking Page:
  - back-to-orders -> Active Orders Page.

- From Reviews Page:
  - write-review-button -> Write Review Page (not detailed in initial requirements, assumed as separate or modal).
  - filter-by-rating -> Filters reviews.
  - back-to-dashboard -> Dashboard Page.

---

## Section 3: Data Storage Formats

### 1. Restaurants Data
- File Name: restaurants.txt
- Schema: restaurant_id|name|cuisine|address|phone|rating|delivery_time|min_order
- Fields:
  - restaurant_id: integer
  - name: string
  - cuisine: string
  - address: string
  - phone: string
  - rating: float
  - delivery_time: integer (minutes)
  - min_order: float (currency)
- Example:
  1|Dragon House|Chinese|123 Main St|555-0001|4.5|30|15.00

### 2. Menus Data
- File Name: menus.txt
- Schema: item_id|restaurant_id|item_name|category|description|price|availability
- Fields:
  - item_id: integer
  - restaurant_id: integer
  - item_name: string
  - category: string
  - description: string
  - price: float
  - availability: boolean (1 for available, 0 for unavailable)
- Example:
  1|1|Fried Rice|Main Course|Steamed rice with vegetables and egg|12.99|1

### 3. Cart Data
- File Name: cart.txt
- Schema: cart_id|item_id|restaurant_id|quantity|added_date
- Fields:
  - cart_id: integer
  - item_id: integer
  - restaurant_id: integer
  - quantity: integer
  - added_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- Example:
  1|1|1|2|2025-01-15

### 4. Orders Data
- File Name: orders.txt
- Schema: order_id|customer_name|restaurant_id|order_date|total_amount|status|delivery_address|phone_number
- Fields:
  - order_id: integer
  - customer_name: string
  - restaurant_id: integer
  - order_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD)
  - total_amount: float
  - status: string (e.g., Delivered, On the Way, Preparing)
  - delivery_address: string
  - phone_number: string
- Example:
  1|John Doe|1|2025-01-10|21.98|Delivered|123 Main St, NYC|555-1234

### 5. Order Items Data
- File Name: order_items.txt
- Schema: order_item_id|order_id|item_id|quantity|price
- Fields:
  - order_item_id: integer
  - order_id: integer
  - item_id: integer
  - quantity: integer
  - price: float
- Example:
  1|1|1|2|12.99

### 6. Deliveries Data
- File Name: deliveries.txt
- Schema: delivery_id|order_id|driver_name|driver_phone|vehicle_info|status|estimated_time
- Fields:
  - delivery_id: integer
  - order_id: integer
  - driver_name: string
  - driver_phone: string
  - vehicle_info: string
  - status: string
  - estimated_time: datetime string (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
- Example:
  1|1|Mike Johnson|555-9001|Bike|Delivered|2025-01-10 18:45

### 7. Reviews Data
- File Name: reviews.txt
- Schema: review_id|restaurant_id|customer_name|rating|review_text|review_date
- Fields:
  - review_id: integer
  - restaurant_id: integer
  - customer_name: string
  - rating: integer (1-5)
  - review_text: string
  - review_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- Example:
  1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Excellent food and fast delivery!|2025-01-12

---

This specification document fully defines the page structures, navigation logic, and local data formats for the FoodDelivery Python web application as required.

# FoodDelivery Web Application Design Specification

---

## Section 1: Page Layouts and Element IDs

### 1. Dashboard Page
- Page Title: Food Delivery Dashboard
- Container ID: dashboard-page (Div)
- Elements:
  - featured-restaurants (Div): Displays featured restaurant recommendations.
  - browse-restaurants-button (Button): Navigates to Restaurant Listing Page.
  - view-cart-button (Button): Navigates to Shopping Cart Page.
  - active-orders-button (Button): Navigates to Active Orders Page.

### 2. Restaurant Listing Page
- Page Title: Browse Restaurants
- Container ID: restaurants-page (Div)
- Elements:
  - search-input (Input): Field to search restaurants by name or cuisine.
  - cuisine-filter (Dropdown): Filter restaurants by cuisine (Chinese, Italian, Indian, American, etc.).
  - restaurants-grid (Div): Grid for displaying restaurant cards.
  - view-restaurant-button-{restaurant_id} (Button): View restaurant menu; one per restaurant card.

### 3. Restaurant Menu Page
- Page Title: Restaurant Menu
- Container ID: menu-page (Div)
- Elements:
  - restaurant-name (H1): Displays restaurant name.
  - restaurant-info (Div): Displays restaurant address, phone, rating.
  - menu-items-grid (Div): Grid showing menu items with photos, names, descriptions, prices.
  - add-to-cart-button-{item_id} (Button): Add menu item to cart; one per menu item.
  - view-item-details-{item_id} (Button): View item details; one per menu item.

### 4. Item Details Page
- Page Title: Item Details
- Container ID: item-details-page (Div)
- Elements:
  - item-name (H1): Displays item name.
  - item-description (Div): Shows description and ingredients.
  - item-price (Div): Displays item price.
  - quantity-input (Input number): Quantity selection before adding to cart.
  - add-to-cart-button (Button): Adds item with quantity to cart.

### 5. Shopping Cart Page
- Page Title: Shopping Cart
- Container ID: cart-page (Div)
- Elements:
  - cart-items-table (Table): Displays cart items - name, quantity, price, subtotal.
  - update-quantity-{item_id} (Input number): Update quantity per cart item.
  - remove-item-button-{item_id} (Button): Remove item from cart.
  - proceed-checkout-button (Button): Proceed to checkout page.
  - total-amount (Div): Displays total cart amount.

### 6. Checkout Page
- Page Title: Checkout
- Container ID: checkout-page (Div)
- Elements:
  - customer-name (Input): Enter customer name.
  - delivery-address (Textarea): Enter delivery address.
  - phone-number (Input): Enter phone number.
  - payment-method (Dropdown): Select payment method (Credit Card, Cash, PayPal).
  - place-order-button (Button): Confirm and place the order.

### 7. Active Orders Page
- Page Title: Active Orders
- Container ID: active-orders-page (Div)
- Elements:
  - orders-list (Div): Displays active orders with order ID, restaurant, status, ETA.
  - track-order-button-{order_id} (Button): View tracking details.
  - status-filter (Dropdown): Filter orders by status (All, Preparing, On the Way, Delivered).
  - back-to-dashboard (Button): Return to dashboard.

### 8. Order Tracking Page
- Page Title: Track Order
- Container ID: tracking-page (Div)
- Elements:
  - order-details (Div): Shows complete order details and timeline.
  - delivery-driver-info (Div): Driver name, phone, vehicle info.
  - estimated-time (Div): Displays estimated delivery time.
  - order-items-list (Div): List of ordered items.
  - back-to-orders (Button): Return to Active Orders Page.

### 9. Reviews Page
- Page Title: Order Reviews
- Container ID: reviews-page (Div)
- Elements:
  - reviews-list (Div): List of reviews with restaurant name, rating, and text.
  - write-review-button (Button): Navigate to write review page.
  - filter-by-rating (Dropdown): Filter reviews by rating (All, 5 stars, 4 stars, etc.).
  - back-to-dashboard (Button): Return to dashboard.

---

## Section 2: Navigation Flow

- Application starts at Dashboard Page (dashboard-page).
- From Dashboard:
  - browse-restaurants-button -> Restaurant Listing Page (restaurants-page).
  - view-cart-button -> Shopping Cart Page (cart-page).
  - active-orders-button -> Active Orders Page (active-orders-page).

- From Restaurant Listing Page:
  - view-restaurant-button-{restaurant_id} -> Restaurant Menu Page (menu-page) for selected restaurant.

- From Restaurant Menu Page:
  - add-to-cart-button-{item_id} -> Adds item to Shopping Cart.
  - view-item-details-{item_id} -> Item Details Page (item-details-page) for selected item.

- From Item Details Page:
  - add-to-cart-button -> Add selected quantity to Shopping Cart.

- From Shopping Cart Page:
  - update-quantity-{item_id} -> Updates item quantity in cart.
  - remove-item-button-{item_id} -> Removes item from cart.
  - proceed-checkout-button -> Checkout Page (checkout-page).

- From Checkout Page:
  - place-order-button -> Places order and navigates to Active Orders Page.

- From Active Orders Page:
  - track-order-button-{order_id} -> Order Tracking Page (tracking-page).
  - status-filter -> Filters orders by status.
  - back-to-dashboard -> Dashboard Page.

- From Order Tracking Page:
  - back-to-orders -> Active Orders Page.

- From Reviews Page:
  - write-review-button -> Write Review Page (not detailed in initial requirements, assumed as separate or modal).
  - filter-by-rating -> Filters reviews.
  - back-to-dashboard -> Dashboard Page.

---

## Section 3: Data Storage Formats

### 1. Restaurants Data
- File Name: restaurants.txt
- Schema: restaurant_id|name|cuisine|address|phone|rating|delivery_time|min_order
- Fields:
  - restaurant_id: integer
  - name: string
  - cuisine: string
  - address: string
  - phone: string
  - rating: float
  - delivery_time: integer (minutes)
  - min_order: float (currency)
- Example:
  1|Dragon House|Chinese|123 Main St|555-0001|4.5|30|15.00

### 2. Menus Data
- File Name: menus.txt
- Schema: item_id|restaurant_id|item_name|category|description|price|availability
- Fields:
  - item_id: integer
  - restaurant_id: integer
  - item_name: string
  - category: string
  - description: string
  - price: float
  - availability: boolean (1 for available, 0 for unavailable)
- Example:
  1|1|Fried Rice|Main Course|Steamed rice with vegetables and egg|12.99|1

### 3. Cart Data
- File Name: cart.txt
- Schema: cart_id|item_id|restaurant_id|quantity|added_date
- Fields:
  - cart_id: integer
  - item_id: integer
  - restaurant_id: integer
  - quantity: integer
  - added_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- Example:
  1|1|1|2|2025-01-15

### 4. Orders Data
- File Name: orders.txt
- Schema: order_id|customer_name|restaurant_id|order_date|total_amount|status|delivery_address|phone_number
- Fields:
  - order_id: integer
  - customer_name: string
  - restaurant_id: integer
  - order_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD)
  - total_amount: float
  - status: string (e.g., Delivered, On the Way, Preparing)
  - delivery_address: string
  - phone_number: string
- Example:
  1|John Doe|1|2025-01-10|21.98|Delivered|123 Main St, NYC|555-1234

### 5. Order Items Data
- File Name: order_items.txt
- Schema: order_item_id|order_id|item_id|quantity|price
- Fields:
  - order_item_id: integer
  - order_id: integer
  - item_id: integer
  - quantity: integer
  - price: float
- Example:
  1|1|1|2|12.99

### 6. Deliveries Data
- File Name: deliveries.txt
- Schema: delivery_id|order_id|driver_name|driver_phone|vehicle_info|status|estimated_time
- Fields:
  - delivery_id: integer
  - order_id: integer
  - driver_name: string
  - driver_phone: string
  - vehicle_info: string
  - status: string
  - estimated_time: datetime string (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
- Example:
  1|1|Mike Johnson|555-9001|Bike|Delivered|2025-01-10 18:45

### 7. Reviews Data
- File Name: reviews.txt
- Schema: review_id|restaurant_id|customer_name|rating|review_text|review_date
- Fields:
  - review_id: integer
  - restaurant_id: integer
  - customer_name: string
  - rating: integer (1-5)
  - review_text: string
  - review_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- Example:
  1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Excellent food and fast delivery!|2025-01-12

Dashboard Page - Page Title: Food Delivery Dashboard - Container ID: dashboard-page (Div) - Elements:   - featured-restaurants (Div): Displays featured restaurant recommendations.   - browse-restaurants-button (Button): Navigates to Restaurant Listing Page.   - view-cart-button (Button): Navigates to Shopping Cart Page.   - active-orders-button (Button): Navigates to Active Orders Page.  ### 2. Restaurant Listing Page - Page Title: Browse Restaurants - Container ID: restaurants-page (Div) - Elements:   - search-input (Input): Field to search restaurants by name or cuisine.   - cuisine-filter (Dropdown): Filter restaurants by cuisine (Chinese, Italian, Indian, American, etc.).   - restaurants-grid (Div): Grid for displaying restaurant cards.   - view-restaurant-button-{restaurant_id} (Button): View restaurant menu; one per restaurant card.  ### 3. Restaurant Menu Page - Page Title: Restaurant Menu - Container ID: menu-page (Div) - Elements:   - restaurant-name (H1): Displays restaurant name.   - restaurant-info (Div): Displays restaurant address, phone, rating.   - menu-items-grid (Div): Grid showing menu items with photos, names, descriptions, prices.   - add-to-cart-button-{item_id} (Button): Add menu item to cart; one per menu item.   - view-item-details-{item_id} (Button): View item details; one per menu item.  ### 4. Item Details Page - Page Title: Item Details - Container ID: item-details-page (Div) - Elements:   - item-name (H1): Displays item name.   - item-description (Div): Shows description and ingredients.   - item-price (Div): Displays item price.   - quantity-input (Input number): Quantity selection before adding to cart.   - add-to-cart-button (Button): Adds item with quantity to cart.  ### 5. Shopping Cart Page - Page Title: Shopping Cart - Container ID: cart-page (Div) - Elements:   - cart-items-table (Table): Displays cart items - name, quantity, price, subtotal.   - update-quantity-{item_id} (Input number): Update quantity per cart item.   - remove-item-button-{item_id} (Button): Remove item from cart.   - proceed-checkout-button (Button): Proceed to checkout page.   - total-amount (Div): Displays total cart amount.  ### 6. Checkout Page - Page Title: Checkout - Container ID: checkout-page (Div) - Elements:   - customer-name (Input): Enter customer name.   - delivery-address (Textarea): Enter delivery address.   - phone-number (Input): Enter phone number.   - payment-method (Dropdown): Select payment method (Credit Card, Cash, PayPal).   - place-order-button (Button): Confirm and place the order.  ### 7. Active Orders Page - Page Title: Active Orders - Container ID: active-orders-page (Div) - Elements:   - orders-list (Div): Displays active orders with order ID, restaurant, status, ETA.   - track-order-button-{order_id} (Button): View tracking details.   - status-filter (Dropdown): Filter orders by status (All, Preparing, On the Way, Delivered).   - back-to-dashboard (Button): Return to dashboard.  ### 8. Order Tracking Page - Page Title: Track Order - Container ID: tracking-page (Div) - Elements:   - order-details (Div): Shows complete order details and timeline.   - delivery-driver-info (Div): Driver name, phone, vehicle info.   - estimated-time (Div): Displays estimated delivery time.   - order-items-list (Div): List of ordered items.   - back-to-orders (Button): Return to Active Orders Page.  ### 9. Reviews Page - Page Title: Order Reviews - Container ID: reviews-page (Div) - Elements:   - reviews-list (Div): List of reviews with restaurant name, rating, and text.   - write-review-button (Button): Navigate to write review page.   - filter-by-rating (Dropdown): Filter reviews by rating (All, 5 stars, 4 stars, etc.).   - back-to-dashboard (Button): Return to dashboard.  ---  ## Section 2: Navigation Flow  - Application starts at Dashboard Page (dashboard-page). - From Dashboard:   - browse-restaurants-button -> Restaurant Listing Page (restaurants-page).   - view-cart-button -> Shopping Cart Page (cart-page).   - active-orders-button -> Active Orders Page (active-orders-page).  - From Restaurant Listing Page:   - view-restaurant-button-{restaurant_id} -> Restaurant Menu Page (menu-page) for selected restaurant.  - From Restaurant Menu Page:   - add-to-cart-button-{item_id} -> Adds item to Shopping Cart.   - view-item-details-{item_id} -> Item Details Page (item-details-page) for selected item.  - From Item Details Page:   - add-to-cart-button -> Add selected quantity to Shopping Cart.  - From Shopping Cart Page:   - update-quantity-{item_id} -> Updates item quantity in cart.   - remove-item-button-{item_id} -> Removes item from cart.   - proceed-checkout-button -> Checkout Page (checkout-page).  - From Checkout Page:   - place-order-button -> Places order and navigates to Active Orders Page.  - From Active Orders Page:   - track-order-button-{order_id} -> Order Tracking Page (tracking-page).   - status-filter -> Filters orders by status.   - back-to-dashboard -> Dashboard Page.  - From Order Tracking Page:   - back-to-orders -> Active Orders Page.  - From Reviews Page:   - write-review-button -> Write Review Page (not detailed in initial requirements, assumed as separate or modal).   - filter-by-rating -> Filters reviews.   - back-to-dashboard -> Dashboard Page.  ---  ## Section 3: Data Storage Formats  ### 1. Restaurants Data - File Name: restaurants.txt - Schema: restaurant_id|name|cuisine|address|phone|rating|delivery_time|min_order - Fields:   - restaurant_id: integer   - name: string   - cuisine: string   - address: string   - phone: string   - rating: float   - delivery_time: integer (minutes)   - min_order: float (currency) - Example:   1|Dragon House|Chinese|123 Main St|555-0001|4.5|30|15.00  ### 2. Menus Data - File Name: menus.txt - Schema: item_id|restaurant_id|item_name|category|description|price|availability - Fields:   - item_id: integer   - restaurant_id: integer   - item_name: string   - category: string   - description: string   - price: float   - availability: boolean (1 for available, 0 for unavailable) - Example:   1|1|Fried Rice|Main Course|Steamed rice with vegetables and egg|12.99|1  ### 3. Cart Data - File Name: cart.txt - Schema: cart_id|item_id|restaurant_id|quantity|added_date - Fields:   - cart_id: integer   - item_id: integer   - restaurant_id: integer   - quantity: integer   - added_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD) - Example:   1|1|1|2|2025-01-15  ### 4. Orders Data - File Name: orders.txt - Schema: order_id|customer_name|restaurant_id|order_date|total_amount|status|delivery_address|phone_number - Fields:   - order_id: integer   - customer_name: string   - restaurant_id: integer   - order_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD)   - total_amount: float   - status: string (e.g., Delivered, On the Way, Preparing)   - delivery_address: string   - phone_number: string - Example:   1|John Doe|1|2025-01-10|21.98|Delivered|123 Main St, NYC|555-1234  ### 5. Order Items Data - File Name: order_items.txt - Schema: order_item_id|order_id|item_id|quantity|price - Fields:   - order_item_id: integer   - order_id: integer   - item_id: integer   - quantity: integer   - price: float - Example:   1|1|1|2|12.99  ### 6. Deliveries Data - File Name: deliveries.txt - Schema: delivery_id|order_id|driver_name|driver_phone|vehicle_info|status|estimated_time - Fields:   - delivery_id: integer   - order_id: integer   - driver_name: string   - driver_phone: string   - vehicle_info: string   - status: string   - estimated_time: datetime string (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM) - Example:   1|1|Mike Johnson|555-9001|Bike|Delivered|2025-01-10 18:45  ### 7. Reviews Data - File Name: reviews.txt - Schema: review_id|restaurant_id|customer_name|rating|review_text|review_date - Fields:   - review_id: integer   - restaurant_id: integer   - customer_name: string   - rating: integer (1-5)   - review_text: string   - review_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD) - Example:   1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Excellent food and fast delivery!|2025-01-12  ---  This specification document fully defines the page structures, navigation logic, and local data formats for the FoodDelivery Python web application as required.

load_menus()\n    item = next((i for i in menus if i['item_id'] == item_id), None)\n    if not item:\n        return \"Item not found\", 404\n    cart = load_cart()\n    # Check if same item exists in cart, update quantity\n    found = False\n    for c in cart:\n        if c['item_id'] == item_id:\n            c['quantity'] += quantity\n            found = True\n            break\n    if not == 'POST':\n        # Update quantities or remove items\n        if 'update' in request.form:\n            for key in request.form:\n                if key.startswith('update-quantity-'):\n                    try:\n                        item_id = int(key.replace('update-quantity-', ''))\n                        qty = int(request.form[key])\n                        for c in carts:\n                            if c['item_id'] == item_id:\n                                if qty < 1:\n                                    carts.remove(c)\n                                else:\n                                    c['quantity'] = qty\n                                break\n                    except:\n                        continue\n            save_cart(carts)\n        elif 'remove' in request.form:\n            item_id = int(request.form['remove'])\n            carts = [c for c in carts if c['item_id'] != item_id]\n            save_cart(carts)\n        return   [app.py] from flask import Flask, render_template, request, redirect, url_for import os import datetime  app = Flask(__name__)  data_dir = 'data'  # Helpers to load and save data  def load_restaurants():     restaurants = []     path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'restaurants.txt')     if not os.path.exists(path):         return restaurants     with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:         for line in f:             parts = line.strip().split('|')             if len(parts) != 8:                 continue             r = {                 'restaurant_id': int(parts[0]),                 'name': parts[1],                 'cuisine': parts[2],                 'address': parts[3],                 'phone': parts[4],                 'rating': float(parts[5]),                 'delivery_time': int(parts[6]),                 'min_order': float(parts[7])             }             restaurants.append(r)     return restaurants  def load_menus():     menus = []     path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'menus.txt')     if not os.path.exists(path):         return menus     with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:         for line in f:             parts = line.strip().split('|')             if len(parts) != 7:                 continue             item = {                 'item_id': int(parts[0]),                 'restaurant_id': int(parts[1]),                 'item_name': parts[2],                 'category': parts[3],                 'description': parts[4],                 'price': float(parts[5]),                 'availability': parts[6] == '1'             }             menus.append(item)     return menus  def load_cart():     cart = []     path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'cart.txt')     if not os.path.exists(path):         return cart     with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:         for line in f:             parts = line.strip().split('|')             if len(parts) != 5:                 continue             entry = {                 'cart_id': int(parts[0]),                 'item_id': int(parts[1]),                 'restaurant_id': int(parts[2]),                 'quantity': int(parts[3]),                 'added_date': parts[4]             }             cart.append(entry)     return cart  def save_cart(cart):     path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'cart.txt')     with open(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:         for c in cart:             f.write(f"{c['cart_id']}|{c['item_id']}|{c['restaurant_id']}|{c['quantity']}|{c['added_date']}\n")   def load_orders():     orders = []     path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'orders.txt')     if not os.path.exists(path):         return orders     with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:         for line in f:             parts = line.strip().split('|')             if len(parts) != 8:                 continue             order = {                 'order_id': int(parts[0]),                 'customer_name': parts[1],                 'restaurant_id': int(parts[2]),                 'order_date': parts[3],                 'total_amount': float(parts[4]),                 'status': parts[5],                 'delivery_address': parts[6],                 'phone_number': parts[7]             }             orders.append(order)     return orders  def load_order_items():     order_items = []     path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'order_items.txt')     if not os.path.exists(path):         return order_items     with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:         for line in f:             parts = line.strip().split('|')             if len(parts) != 5:                 continue             oi = {                 'order_item_id': int(parts[0]),                 'order_id': int(parts[1]),                 'item_id': int(parts[2]),                 'quantity': int(parts[3]),                 'price': float(parts[4])             }             order_items.append(oi)     return order_items  def load_deliveries():     deliveries = []     path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'deliveries.txt')     if not os.path.exists(path):         return deliveries     with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:         for line in f:             parts = line.strip().split('|')             if len(parts) != 7:                 continue             d = {                 'delivery_id': int(parts[0]),                 'order_id': int(parts[1]),                 'driver_name': parts[2],                 'driver_phone': parts[3],                 'vehicle_info': parts[4],                 'status': parts[5],                 'estimated_time': parts[6]             }             deliveries.append(d)     return deliveries  def load_reviews():     reviews = []     path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'reviews.txt')     if not os.path.exists(path):         return reviews     with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:         for line in f:             parts = line.strip().split('|')             if len(parts) != 6:                 continue             review = {                 'review_id': int(parts[0]),                 'restaurant_id': int(parts[1]),                 'customer_name': parts[2],                 'rating': int(parts[3]),                 'review_text': parts[4],                 'review_date': parts[5]             }             reviews.append(review)     return reviews   # Route: Dashboard @app.route('/') def dashboard():     restaurants = load_restaurants()     featured = key.startswith('update-quantity-'):                     try:                         item_id = int(key.replace('update-quantity-', ''))                         qty = int(request.form[key])                         for c in carts:                             if c['item_id'] == item_id:                                 if qty < 1:                                     carts.remove(c)                                 else:                                     c['quantity'] = qty                                 break                     except:                         continue             save_cart(carts)                     cards[i].style.display = 'none';
